chunks.title: Blessing of the Forgiven
chunks.reason: Introduces the psalm with a declaration of blessedness for those whose sins are forgiven.

chunks.title: Personal Confession and Forgiveness
chunks.reason: Describes the physical toll of unconfessed sin and the relief found in acknowledging it to God.

chunks.title: Call to Prayer and Promise of Safety
chunks.reason: Urges the holy ones to pray while God is accessible and describes God as a protective hiding place.

chunks.title: Divine Guidance versus Stubbornness
chunks.reason: Contrasts the wisdom of God's instruction with the stubbornness of beasts and the sorrow of the wicked.

chunks.title: Call to Rejoice
chunks.reason: Concludes with a direct command for the righteous to rejoice in Yahweh.
